_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in using network management tools (e.g., simple network management protocol (SNMP), (GrassMarlin) to analyze network traffic patterns (e.g., including control system network analysis).
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of networking fundamentals relevant to data systems, including TCP/IP, DNS resolution, HTTP/HTTPS protocols, firewall and security group configurations, load balancing, and how network architecture affects data pipeline design and performance.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI TF domain. TF-K-013 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-S-012 (TF, cosine: 0.425), TF-A-002 (TF, cosine: 0.416).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.0/10 (raw 0.595). Shared vocabulary: [network]. DCWF-only terms [analysis, analyze, control, grassmarlin, management, patterns] vs WIDAI-only terms [affects, architecture, balancing, configurations, data, design] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.847 (P=0.840, R=0.854). Balanced P/R — the 24-word DCWF element and 31-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (91.8%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Skill in using network management tools (e.g., simple network management protoco" and "Knowledge of networking fundamentals relevant to data systems, including TCP/IP,". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.471 < STS 0.595 (gap -0.123). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [analysis, analyze, control] and [affects, architecture, balancing] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.4%. Shared tokens: [network]. DCWF-only: [analysis, analyze, control, grassmarlin, management, patterns]. WIDAI-only: [affects, architecture, balancing, configurations, data, design].
